name: Jim Banks
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $926,321 for Jim Banks in U.S. Senate, IN. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
